title: HIV/AIDS RAPID TESTING AND PREVENTION - 211info
text: LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH ALBANY HIV/AIDS RAPID TESTING AND PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential rapid testing for HIV/AIDS, syphilis, and hepatitis C. Offers prevention education and treatment support. Assists with access to HIV medications, transportation to medical appointments, transitional housing, disease management education, and referrals for basic needs, employment, and substance use treatment. 1050 SW 7th Avenue Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 967-3888 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 967-3888 Main phone (541) 926-2102 FAX (800) 735-1232 TTY/TTD (800) 304-7468 Toll-free Main phone (541) 967-3888 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Case/Care Management * AIDS/HIV Issues Health Insurance Premium Assistance * AIDS/HIV Medical Care Expense Assistance * AIDS/HIV Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * AIDS/HIV Prescription Expense Assistance * AIDS/HIV Rent Payment Assistance * AIDS/HIV Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH ALBANY
